_comment: Neutral-atom zoned architecture for the distance-3 surface-code XX-merge, laid out with WELL-SEPARATED zones following Qian Xu's architecture (Xu et al. 2024 Nat.Phys. Fig.1: distinct memory / mediating-ancilla / computation regions; factoring layout = memory + processor + factory + operation-zone ancilla N_A + reservoir). The storage SLM (id 0) holds MEMORY (cols 0-5) and OPERATION-ANCILLA (cols 12-17) separated by an empty gap (cols 6-11); FACTORY and RESERVOIR are separate reserved regions to the right (empty -- this merge is Clifford); the ENTANGLING/processor zone (SLMs 3-4) sits well above (big y gap), where the Rydberg CZ (the merge) fires. Distances um, durations us.
name: surface3_qianxu_zoned_arch
